title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player
body: I feel like it definitely helps to have all these incredible support staff and facilities. If I was a D1 athlete, I would literally feel obligated to win every single game if this was what was behind me.
author: @YourBillionaireBlueprint

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player
body: Thank you for renewing my hope in the younger generation pertaining to faith in our Lord. You are an inspiration to a lot of young adults. Keep up the fantastic work!!
author: @mattdail6294

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player
body: man i remember this like it was ysterday when hangtime was still a cutie patootie until now though im glad your channel is still big mike!
author: @jaczey

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player
body: Not an Oklahoma fan or anything, but I really appreciate you taking the time to make this content.  I found it very entertaining.  Also, I never thought much about the Sooner's facilities, but they're super nice.  I wish you nothing but the best my guy.
author: @URSoDead2Me

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player
body: My mom heard what I was watching and said wow that is crazy I think I just needed those words right now! Thanks, man you're awesome. I pray you make NFL!!!
author: @kentjones9280

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player
body: Great vlog as always.  And thank you for including the names of some of the new players that are in the vlog as it helps identify who is who.  Lord willing may your arm heal real soon.  Boomer!
author: @Defender1026

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player
body: Turk, enjoy seeing your world at OU and glad to see the specialists still mess around like back in the day when I was there with Tony D. and Uwe VonS. (and your facilities are FAR better than we had but we have two National Championship rings 74/75, get after it!)
author: @williamshirk2897

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player
body: Hey Michael, I’m just here to thank you for the content you put out. Recently I’ve been waking up at 4:30 and watching your Bible studies before school starts.
author: @danielchiddister9221

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player
body: Dunno why this got suggested but enjoyed it. So different to university sport in the Uk. Feel for ya with the broken hand I did my hand/thumb/arm 6 years in a row after I left university and ended up having to retire early. Gets tough mentally it’s a dark place been injured. Keep going bro
author: @Nik2555

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player
body: Turk I love that you stayed on another year when you didn't have to, it shows your love and commitment to the team and fans.
author: @dementiabiden1621

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player
body: my whole life I have been dreaming about playing college ball. Unfortunately I'm from Europe and it is super hard to get over there. When I had the chance I tore my ACL and didn't get any offers. Now I'm a little too old to get in somewhere, but your videos really lighten me up and make me dream of what could have been. Keep it up! May God bless you!
author: @cornflakesmuncher

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player
body: Ben Harris making the blog! His mom was the trainer that took care of me when I dislocated my knee way back in 1992!
author: @InformalGreeting

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: I wish the NCAA wasn’t so sketch about student athletes making vids about their lives in college because these are all really great
author: @Mytoekhandr1a

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: I've always wondered about the Baylor athletes and what they go through. I always saw them around campus but never knew how hard they worked on top of school work. Thank you for showing different parts of campus. I forgot how beautiful Baylor was. Seems like a cool group of ladies. Keep up the hard work and the Vlogs. Sic' Em Bears!
author: @kim0mook

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: "I clearly don't put the student in student athlete" well if that ain't the tea, idk what is 😂 I feel you girl
author: @joshuam4049

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: the saying "pretty people attract other pretty people" becomes more accurate when it comes to kylie and her group of friends
author: @neareee4224

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: I always wondered what D1 athletes go through. Low key wish I would’ve gone to Baylor. Looks like your team has a strong bond can’t wait for more videos 😘
author: @jensavant915

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: i love watching these videos because i'm 13 right now and my dream is to be a D1 soccer student athlete and these are great motivation
author: @haleegoeppner987

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: okay but like I'm jealous of her life. I mean soccer practice at 6AM and playing soccer while watching the sunrise? yes please!
author: @marasydney6517

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: Went to high school with you! Crazy this popped up on my page! We had mutual friends and only met a few times but was also was so nice! Glad you started a YouTube channel!
author: @madelynwoida2218

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: Love watching these vlogs of daily routines as an athlete, shows how much hard work we put in, alltho in this video it wasn't really alot of training footage and so :D
author: @alenx5455

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: This is so cool! I just finished my freshman year at Baylor. It’s so interesting to see how different life is for the athletes there at BU! Sic ‘em!
author: @mariahtrigo1427

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: Okay but did y’all just see how she caught the sky changing colors? Talk about perfect timing. Love the video btw 💓
author: @cjtsosie

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: I got the chance to go to this campus for a tour, it was one of the biggest, modest and cleanest campuses. Great vid!!!
author: @jordanpierre6775

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: Say hi to Eva Mitchell for me! Tell her we miss her at UK and we wish her all the best! I was in Waco last week for my birthday, the campus is pretty! #SicEm #GoCats
author: @tybuck

title: DAY IN THE LIFE | D1 STUDENT-ATHLETE | BAYLOR SOCCER
body: Cool video on the perspective of a soccer player at Baylor! Definitely looking forward to the season coming up starting tomorrow in an exhibition match against Texas A&M Corpus Christi!
author: @scottybthebaylorking6736

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player Summer Workouts
body: Yessir Turk. First year playing football and loving every second of summer workouts. Future D1 kicker in the making right here
author: @gamingchariot4626

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player Summer Workouts
body: Turk thank you for posting this today. God knew I needed to watch this today. You help make me smile day in and day out. God has given you a gift to be a light to us in this World. Today was a tough day at work for me, but watching this video helped make me smile, and yeah let's Go OU football and Softball. Lord willing they win the series this year!!
author: @andreastephens6855

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player Summer Workouts
body: This is insane to me lol what an absolutely AWESOME college experience you are getting. It is absolutely the perfect environment for you guys to thrive in. I would love so much to be able to get in a routine like this lol if I had a channel like this to follow when I was growing up and playing ball I probably would have stuck with it a little harder knowing where it could take me. I didn't think y'all had it THIS luxurious. This routine is insane. I love that there Is just good ass food everywhere.
author: @TheDedloc

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player Summer Workouts
body: This was a thorough look behind the scenes!  Awesome.  It was also good to see some of the guys (Danny is slowly turning into Bosworth!).
author: @BoomerKeith1

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player Summer Workouts
body: the production on these vids are amazing. the cuts are placed perfectly and the text boxes are placed perfectly. it's just emaculate.
author: @jonathansaunderss

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player Summer Workouts
body: I just found your channel and I'm already obsessed! I want to be a student athlete when I get to college so your vlogs help me understand just how hard it will be if I continue to follow my dreams and that is something that I really needed.
author: @carolinecosgrove4305

title: Day in the Life: D1 College Football Player Summer Workouts
body: Love the videos Turk!! Praying the Lord blesses you this year and opens doors!! 🙏🏽 Let’s go high!! Boomer 🙌🏽🙌🏽🙌🏽

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: Thanks for watching! Please subscribe if you're new and I'll see ya in the next one yesssssir. Bible verse of the video: Proverbs 16:3 "Commit to the LORD whatever you do, and he will establish your plans."

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: It's hard to be a really good athlete and a really good student at the same time. Much respect to those who are

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: The professor being like “who did that?! Stand up right now I want to see who did it” had me dying lol
author: @gamesbond1873

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: As much time as I've spent on campus at OU I've never seen the athlete's perspective so it's always dope to get a glimpse! Keep putting out heat Turk 🔥
author: @lanceoneil

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: Dude I’m still in awe of that 1st qrt. 100 yard punt. Against Tex .WTH. You were on the 5 yard line and it went 5 yards deep in their end zone. So glad your a Sooner!  I mean really !!!
author: @jermlittle1970

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: We need more Danny. Young kid is a stud and he’s just seems like a good kid. So glad to see him back healthy and helping us out on defense. Dude is a beast.

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: As an European I’m always so amazed at the level of professionalism and the shear size of the whole operation in college football.
author: @MrBulby-ii1um

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: "Who just did that?  Stand up" 😂  More awesome content.  You about to quietly hit 25k.  To God all the Glory.
author: @williammosconi7473

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: Fantastic man! So glad you chose to come to OU. Even though we never want to punt it’s still exciting to see you kick it 70 plus!

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: Turk my boy...yOU have been a blessing for the University of Oklahoma in many ways and we are lucky to have yOU! God bless you!

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: What a genuinely good dude, God has an incredible plan for you brother. I'm praying for you when I see you on the field.

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: Hey Turk, was at the OU vs TCU game it was great, your the goat punter in collage football #hornsdown
author: @Jackson-bf3lk

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: First time I saw the locker room I thought about looking for my old one but quickly realized everything is new and improved!  Either way great channel my man I like seeing the inside scoop from here in Kansas still.  God Bless
author: @marshallmusil186

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: Every time I see the facilities I’m in awe. First time I saw them was on my official visit… in 1992. Things have changed just a bit.
author: @InformalGreeting

title: D1 Athlete Day in the Life: Oklahoma Football Punter
body: Hey man, God bless you bro, you’re an amazing athlete! Currently a sr in college, never been to an OU game, hoping to make the drive to Norman and watch you and the guy’s play! Also shout out to my boy Reid from Clinton,Ok!
author: @climas123456

title: D1 ATHLETE DAY IN THE LIFE: FOOTBALL VS SOFTBALL (OKLAHOMA)
body:
Thanks for watching y'all! Help me out by dropping a like and I'll see you in the next one. Let's goooooooooo.
1 Corinthians 10:31 "So whether you eat or drink or whatever you do, do it all for the glory of God."
author: @Hangtime37

title: D1 ATHLETE DAY IN THE LIFE: FOOTBALL VS SOFTBALL (OKLAHOMA)
body: That dorm situation looks like a really comfortable setup. Take advantage of it as long as necessary and try not to compare your living arrangement to anyone else's. I fell into that mind trap at your age and it caused a lot of unnecessary depression and despair. You are right where you need to be. Comparison is the thief of all joy.
author: @marycaroline5064

title: D1 ATHLETE DAY IN THE LIFE: FOOTBALL VS SOFTBALL (OKLAHOMA)
body:
Its actually insane how well D1 college football players are looked after, Ive watched a few of these and everytime a D1 Football player leaves a building he has someone waiting with boxes full of fancy drinks, food and snacks 😂

Its pretty cool, wish we had shit like that in the Uk
author: @CB-dl1vg

title: D1 ATHLETE DAY IN THE LIFE: FOOTBALL VS SOFTBALL (OKLAHOMA)
body: You give such a unique side to your videos. Most of us just imagine what an athlete’s life is like at a big time university. You bring that to life. I must include the OU women’s softball team too. Those ladies are absolute studs, and some of the best softball players in the world. They seem to work hard to sustain that excellence too.
author: @christophercottrell8227

title: D1 ATHLETE DAY IN THE LIFE: FOOTBALL VS SOFTBALL (OKLAHOMA)
body: Man the D1 life is like celebrity status. I played NAIA baseball and our facilities were obviously nowhere close to OU's but it's really jaw dropping seeing the differences. Thank you both for the virtual tour. You two seem like awesome people and it looks like you both are surrounded by a great group of people and teammates. Enjoy your time at OU and live life with no regrets.
author: @kevinz607

title: D1 ATHLETE DAY IN THE LIFE: FOOTBALL VS SOFTBALL (OKLAHOMA)
body: Love to hear that you're involved with FCA. I'm an FCA area rep in Pennsylvania. I also kicked and punted in high school, so the specialists always have a special place in my heart. No lie, the first NFL jersey I ever owned was a David Akers jersey. Love your stuff man. God bless!
author: @adamhburns

title: D1 ATHLETE DAY IN THE LIFE: FOOTBALL VS SOFTBALL (OKLAHOMA)
body:
Love your videos! Appreciate you getting the softBALLERS in. Hope you had an amazing Christmas with family and keep the videos coming.
GOD BLESS
author: @cjstump6406

title: D1 ATHLETE DAY IN THE LIFE: FOOTBALL VS SOFTBALL (OKLAHOMA)
body: Seeing Mims continue to practice and saying “Venables, Venables, Venables” gives me hope he’s staying.  And your to Turk! We need your leg next year.  Don’t count OU out next year, you’d be surprised what a new attitude and spark can do for your team. Sky’s the limit. Let’s go!
author: @Bird-dl7xs

title: D1 ATHLETE DAY IN THE LIFE: FOOTBALL VS SOFTBALL (OKLAHOMA)
body: BRO I LOVE GRACE LYONS AND I LOVE THE OKLAHOMA SOFTBALL TEAM SO MUCH, they seem awesome and i hope they win another championship this year 🔥
author: @reesinq

title: D1 ATHLETE DAY IN THE LIFE: FOOTBALL VS SOFTBALL (OKLAHOMA)
body: Turk, Just beginning to dig into your channel and enjoying it very much.  Merry Christmas to you and your family!  I look forward to watching you in the Alamo Bowl.  God bless!
author: @TheSean7564

title: D1 ATHLETE DAY IN THE LIFE: FOOTBALL VS SOFTBALL (OKLAHOMA)
body:
Hi just passing by and I would like to say that your vlog is so goooooood! I can't resist watching it cause it's full of detail of a good player, and also love your confidence hope you doing great in the league in the following year.

Btw,when you kicking the ball, I was like ,wooo,beautiful leg and posture.
author: @janemay3662

title: D1 ATHLETE DAY IN THE LIFE: FOOTBALL VS SOFTBALL (OKLAHOMA)
body: I recently just moved from CA and I have always loved softball ou, and I moved like 5 mins away from OKC and i got the chance to meet Jocelyn Alo, and I love her and Donahuu. They have always been an insperation to me, and I also have always watched there games on tv, never missed a game
author: @amanda83490
